name: Web Search
description: Search the internet for current information, news, documentation, and research. Fetch and read full webpage content. Uses DuckDuckGo — no API key required.
author: DenPaq

tools.name: web_search
tools.description: Search the internet via DuckDuckGo for current information, news, facts, documentation, or any topic. Returns titles, URLs, and snippets of the top results. No API key required.

query.description: The search query. Be specific for better results.

count.description: Number of results to return (1-10). Defaults to 5.

tools.name: web_fetch
tools.description: Fetch and read the full text content of a URL. Use this to read a specific webpage, article, documentation page, or any public URL. Strips HTML tags and returns readable text. Best used after web_search to read the full content of a result.

url.description: The full URL to fetch (must start with http:// or https://).

systemPromptCapability: search the internet and fetch web pages for current information, research, and documentation via web_search / web_fetch tools
